## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content review progress and discuss upcoming Gitpod rebranding project.](https://fathom.video/share/c5bo15ApRL98W5xVE6osMjckqztLeA7P?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content review process ongoing; Talia to review latest piece for calibration](https://fathom.video/share/c5bo15ApRL98W5xVE6osMjckqztLeA7P?tab=summary&timestamp=73.0)
  - [Gitpod planning major rebranding/renaming in September; SEO expertise needed](https://fathom.video/share/c5bo15ApRL98W5xVE6osMjckqztLeA7P?tab=summary&timestamp=428.0)
  - [Link issues in content generation being addressed; manual reviews to be more stringent](https://fathom.video/share/c5bo15ApRL98W5xVE6osMjckqztLeA7P?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)
  - [New granular content performance report available for tracking individual article metrics](https://fathom.video/share/c5bo15ApRL98W5xVE6osMjckqztLeA7P?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)

## Topics

### Content Review Progress

  - [Talia hasn't reviewed latest piece yet; will do so after the meeting](https://fathom.video/share/c5bo15ApRL98W5xVE6osMjckqztLeA7P?tab=summary&timestamp=73.0)
  - [Condensed feedback given to workflow based on Talia's notes and document review](https://fathom.video/share/c5bo15ApRL98W5xVE6osMjckqztLeA7P?tab=summary&timestamp=19.0)
  - [Cutting down article length expected to resolve many language and linking issues](https://fathom.video/share/c5bo15ApRL98W5xVE6osMjckqztLeA7P?tab=summary&timestamp=51.0)
  - [Plan: review this piece, apply changes across the board, then revamp published pieces](https://fathom.video/share/c5bo15ApRL98W5xVE6osMjckqztLeA7P?tab=summary&timestamp=225.0)
  - [Hold off on creating new content until current batch is properly calibrated](https://fathom.video/share/c5bo15ApRL98W5xVE6osMjckqztLeA7P?tab=summary&timestamp=225.0)

### Subject Matter Expertise for Edits

  - [Talia inquired about potential SME involvement for technical content review](https://fathom.video/share/c5bo15ApRL98W5xVE6osMjckqztLeA7P?tab=summary&timestamp=73.0)
  - [Jason discussing possibility, not currently built into work streams](https://fathom.video/share/c5bo15ApRL98W5xVE6osMjckqztLeA7P?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
  - [Would be an addition to current scope of work (SW)](https://fathom.video/share/c5bo15ApRL98W5xVE6osMjckqztLeA7P?tab=summary&timestamp=175.0)
  - [GrowthX exploring options to recruit and structure offering for technical reviewers](https://fathom.video/share/c5bo15ApRL98W5xVE6osMjckqztLeA7P?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)

### Link Issues and Quality Control

  - [Hallucination of links is a general LLM issue, not specific to Gitpod content](https://fathom.video/share/c5bo15ApRL98W5xVE6osMjckqztLeA7P?tab=summary&timestamp=246.0)
  - [GrowthX acknowledging need for more stringent manual reviews](https://fathom.video/share/c5bo15ApRL98W5xVE6osMjckqztLeA7P?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)
  - [Working with dev team to improve workflows and reduce time-consuming link checks](https://fathom.video/share/c5bo15ApRL98W5xVE6osMjckqztLeA7P?tab=summary&timestamp=264.0)

### Performance Reporting

  - [Jenn to share ACE update in Slack for Lou's visibility](https://fathom.video/share/c5bo15ApRL98W5xVE6osMjckqztLeA7P?tab=summary&timestamp=302.0)
  - [Dave created new granular content performance report](https://fathom.video/share/c5bo15ApRL98W5xVE6osMjckqztLeA7P?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
      - [Includes all blog content](https://fathom.video/share/c5bo15ApRL98W5xVE6osMjckqztLeA7P?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)
      - [Allows tracking of individual article performance over time](https://fathom.video/share/c5bo15ApRL98W5xVE6osMjckqztLeA7P?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)
      - [Useful for identifying refresh needs and potential content merges](https://fathom.video/share/c5bo15ApRL98W5xVE6osMjckqztLeA7P?tab=summary&timestamp=343.0)

### Gitpod Rebranding Project

  - [Major product launch and company renaming planned for September](https://fathom.video/share/c5bo15ApRL98W5xVE6osMjckqztLeA7P?tab=summary&timestamp=428.0)
  - [Full site overhaul, including content restructuring and new website launch](https://fathom.video/share/c5bo15ApRL98W5xVE6osMjckqztLeA7P?tab=summary&timestamp=460.0)
  - [Talia requesting meeting with Dave (SEO expert) next week to discuss strategy](https://fathom.video/share/c5bo15ApRL98W5xVE6osMjckqztLeA7P?tab=summary&timestamp=440.0)
  - [Dave can provide insights on site mapping and content categorization](https://fathom.video/share/c5bo15ApRL98W5xVE6osMjckqztLeA7P?tab=summary&timestamp=490.0)
